scene_input.scene_summary: Abū Bakr sees ʿĀmir ibn Fuhayrah being sold in the market
scene_input.key_visual_action: Abū Bakr looking at ʿĀmir ibn Fuhayrah with compassion

schema_output.scene_summary: Abū Bakr sees ʿĀmir ibn Fuhayrah being sold in the market
schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 65
schema_output.moral_lesson: Compassion and kindness towards those in need

characters.name: Abū Bakr
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades

characters.name: ʿĀmir ibn Fuhayrah
characters.appearance: young man, wearing a simple white thobe and a white cloth head covering, with a look of sadness and resignation on his face

characters.name: Slave trader
characters.appearance: middle-aged man, wearing a dark brown thobe and a black turban, with a firm and unyielding expression

schema_output.narrative_text: Abū Bakr saw ʿĀmir ibn Fuhayrah being sold in the market, and his heart went out to the young man.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. Bustling 7th century Makkah market scene, late afternoon sunlight casting long shadows across the sandy floor. To the left, a slave trader stands with a firm expression, holding a rope attached to the wrist of a young man with a look of sadness and resignation on his face. The young man, the central figure in a simple white thobe and a white cloth head covering, wears a look of sadness and resignation. To the right, a slender older man with slightly stooped shoulders, wearing a flowing white thobe with a deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, stands with his head tilted slightly to the side, looking at the young man with compassion and concern. The slave trader is dressed in dark brown and black, and the young man's expression is one of hopelessness. Soft warm golden light, bustling market mood. Medium shot at eye level. Warm earth, beige, and golden palette with the deep green cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
